Title: Add configurable channel circuit policy
Description: Define channel-level circuit policy structs and classifier while keeping legacy env fallback
Acceptance: Classifier maps channel 34 status 500/502/503 to high_load_temporarily_unavailable and ignores client cancel skip_retry official CLI and 429

Title: Rebuild circuit state machine
Description: Extend channel circuit state with policy fields fixed open window and half-open success handling
Acceptance: Threshold one opens immediately open duration is 300 seconds half-open success closes and half-open failure reopens
Notes: Fixed open window and half_open success count covered

Title: Integrate relay failure recording
Description: Wire classifier into relay error handling and preserve no-retry safety rules
Acceptance: 500 502 503 on claude-sub records high load circuit while official CLI 403 and client cancel do not record

Title: Verify claude-max fallback routing
Description: Ensure open circuit channel 34 is filtered and channel 24 can be selected in same group
Acceptance: When channel 34 is open GetRandomSatisfiedChannel does not return it and selects channel 24 when eligible

Title: Prepare production rollout and observability
Description: Document production policy values and expose safe circuit state in logs/admin status
Acceptance: Logs show circuit class state open_until without request body or secrets and rollback can disable policy
Test_Method: manual smoke plus targeted go tests
Notes: Plan records rollout JSON and rollback
